text: That portion of a transported vehicle or boat which extends beyond the front or rear bumper of an automobile transporter or stinger-steered automobile transporter or boat transporter or stinger-steered boat transporter, or that portion of a transported vehicle that extends beyond the rear bumper of a car carrier.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 127 — Overhang

That portion of a transported vehicle or boat which extends beyond the front or rear bumper of an automobile transporter or stinger-steered automobile transporter or boat transporter or stinger-steered boat transporter, or that portion of a transported vehicle that extends beyond the rear bumper of a car carrier.

*Last modified: Oct. 9, 2015*
